numeric_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]).columns

        df[col].fillna(df[col].median(), inplace=True)

cat_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['object']).columns

# History of Artificial Intelligence: Key Milestones

## Early Foundations (1940s-1950s)
- **1943**: Warren McCulloch and Walter Pitts created the first artificial neuron model
- **1950**: Alan Turing published "Computing Machinery and Intelligence," introducing the Turing Test
- **1956**: The Dartmouth Conference is considered the birth of AI as a field

## Early AI Era (1950s-1970s)
- **1957**: Frank Rosenblatt developed the Perceptron, the first neural network
- **1966**: ELIZA, the first chatbot, was created by Joseph Weizenbaum
- **1972**: The first expert systems emerged

## AI Winter & Resurgence (1980s-1990s)
- **1986**: Backpropagation algorithm made neural networks practical again
- **1997**: IBM's Deep Blue defeated chess champion Garry Kasparov

## Modern AI Era (2000s-Present)
- **2012**: Deep learning breakthrough with ImageNet competition
- **2016**: Google's AlphaGo defeated world champion Lee Sedol in Go
- **2020s**: Large language models and generative AI emerged (GPT, Claude, etc.)

## Key Themes
- Transition from rule-based systems to machine learning
- Evolution from narrow AI toward more general capabilities
- Increasing focus on ethical considerations and safety
